description: Elevate your space with these timeless gallery wall ideas living room featuring ornate gold frames, botanical artwork, and vintage mirrors. title: Cozy DIY Aesthetic Photo Wall with Fairy Lights
description: Transform any blank wall into a warm, nostalgic gallery with this simple DIY string light photo display. This setup uses delicate fairy lights and mini wooden clothespins to showcase favorite Polaroid-style memories, creating a soft, ambient glow that’s perfect for bedrooms, dorms, or home offices. It’s the ultimate way to bring a "golden hour" feel into your space while keeping your favorite moments front and center. 🕯️✨
